column1: There was me and there was Kate, ... party it was, and then there were two other people.
Kate, ... sister I used to share a house with, has gone to work in Australia.
The train ... goes to Manchester leaves from platform 3.
The lady ... teaches us German lives next door.
The film ... I saw yesterday was fantastic.
The guy ... laptop had been stolen called the police.
Every summer John goes to the town ... his parents were born.
That red car, ... is in my garage now, was bought by my sister.
That’s the cat ... I saw in my garden.
Richard is the man ... married my cousin Janet.
The young man ... lives upstairs is very friendly.
I’m trying to find the poem ... was written by my younger brother.
